creator: steve@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

This builds and runs fine on my a.out -current system.  I can't help 
but guess this is a problem with ELF.  We need more details, like is 
you're system ELF or a.out, when was the last time you updated, and 
how a better description (a log) of the errors you are seeing.  Otherwise 
I'm afraid we aren't going to be much help.
